_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: tumor regression was observed in mice treated with 100 mg/kg VS-4718 (p< 0.0001) with corresponding significant reduction of tumor FAK (pY397) autophosphorylation (p=0.03)
details: 100 mg/kg caused tumor regression (p<0.0001) in MDA-MB-231 xenografts with significant reduction of tumor FAK (pY397) autophosphorylation (p=0.03)
